description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a prominent use of red and white brickwork on its exterior walls. The front facade features a balcony with white railings above a covered porch area, and large glass sliding doors and windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The side and rear elevations display a mix of large and narrow windows, arranged asymmetrically, with the rear having a single wide window on the upper floor. The house includes a cantilevered section on one side, adding architectural interest and providing partial cover for the balcony. The roof appears to be accessible, possibly functioning as a terrace, and the overall design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation. Outdoor furniture, such as a chair and a potted plant, are visible on the porch, enhancing the residential feel.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, red and white brick exterior, large windows, and a balcony with white railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony with white railings, large glass doors, a covered porch, and outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered section, asymmetrical window arrangement, and extensive brickwork.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single wide window on the upper floor and a plain brick wall with minimal openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, the balcony from an angle, and the continuation of the brick facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and narrow vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, large glass door, and a balcony above with white railings; minimal decorative elements.
